overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a vibrant, dense urban market street with futuristic vending machines, neon signs, and diverse NPCs. The scene transitions from ground-level market exploration to an elevated walkway overlooking a busy highway, showcasing the game's detailed cyberpunk aesthetic with high-quality lighting and ray-traced reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk market street with food vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the bustling market street, passing various vending machines and market stalls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red mohawk and white crop top walking past the camera
man leaning against blue vending truck drinking from a bottle

entered.detail: large blue food truck with serving window and green counter
outdoor clothing rack with mannequins displaying shirts
tall palm trees lining the center of the pedestrian street
large holographic advertisement visible between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a vibrant cyberpunk market street with a blue vending truck on the left and clothing stalls on the right. The character walks forward through moderate crowds of pedestrians, passing palm trees and various market stalls under bright morning sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: denser market area with trash accumulation and arcade machines

events.description: street becomes more cluttered with large piles of trash bags and debris on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing through the market, navigating around pedestrians and observing the increasingly cluttered street environment

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large accumulation of blue and white garbage bags piled against the building
row of colorful gaming machines with glowing screens
bright purple automated vending unit with 'BURRITO' signage

segments.scene_description: The market street continues with increased density of stalls and visible urban decay. Large trash piles appear on the right side while arcade machines line the left. The character walks past a purple burrito vending machine as the street narrows slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching elevated overpass with modern glass buildings

events.description: camera tilts sharply upward to look at the tall glass skyscraper with reflective windows

agents.ego_description: walking toward the overpass while looking up at the towering glass building and neon signage overhead

notable_agents.action: security guard or worker in uniform standing near the building entrance

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass facade and large 'YABA' neon signage
green-tinted glass and metal pedestrian bridge crossing overhead
traditional-style paper lanterns hanging across the street

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an elevated overpass with a massive glass skyscraper dominating the right side. The camera tilts up to admire the building's height and reflective surface. Traditional neon lanterns hang overhead, mixing old and new architectural styles.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway overlooking multi-level highway interchange

events.description: character walks onto elevated walkway revealing expansive view of highway traffic below
camera pans right to follow cars driving on the highway overpass below

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated overlook, pausing to observe the highway traffic and industrial district views before turning back

notable_agents.action: man in green shirt sitting on concrete bench reading a newspaper

entered.detail: metal railing overlooking multi-level highway with moving traffic
cars and trucks driving on the curved highway ramp below
graffiti-covered concrete seating with NPCs resting

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to an elevated walkway offering a panoramic view of a busy highway interchange. The character walks along the railing, observing the traffic below, then turns back toward the market area. A few NPCs sit on graffiti-covered benches enjoying the view of the industrial district in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a vibrant cyberpunk market that gradually shifts from an open, sunlit plaza into a denser, more decayed urban corridor. It begins by gliding past a blue vending truck and clothing stalls, moving through moderate crowds of pedestrians under the bright morning sun. As the camera advances past palm trees and various market stalls, the environment becomes increasingly cluttered with signs of urban decay. The scene then narrows, shifting from the open market to a tighter street lined with arcade machines and large piles of trash. Finally, the movement continues past a purple burrito vending machine as the surrounding architecture closes in.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dense urban street toward an elevated vantage point overlooking a sprawling industrial highway. It begins as the character approaches an overpass, where the camera tilts upward to capture the towering height and reflective glass of a massive skyscraper framed by traditional neon lanterns. As the character ascends, the scene opens onto an elevated walkway that reveals a panoramic view of a busy highway interchange below. The camera then follows the character along the railing to observe the flowing traffic before turning back toward the market area. Finally, the view expands to include NPCs resting on graffiti-covered benches with the distant industrial district stretching across the horizon.
